nasb.text: ‘This is that which is consecrated to Aaron and that which is consecrated to his sons from the offerings by fire to the Lord, in that day when he presented them to serve as priests to the Lord.

esv.text: This is the portion of Aaron and of his sons from the Lord’s food offerings, from the day they were presented to serve as priests of the Lord.

cnv.text: “這是亞倫和他子孫，從奉獻他們作耶和華的祭司那日開始，受膏立應得的分。

ccb.text: 从亚伦及其子孙受膏为祭司事奉耶和华开始，在献给耶和华的火祭中，这是他们应得之份。
